data.title: Fitts's Law
data.description: The design optimizes the target size and distance for frequently used interactions, like buying options.
data.technical_spec: UI components are easily clickable, reducing the user's movement time across the interface.

data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Minimizes choice overload by categorizing products into clearly defined groups.
data.technical_spec: Efficient taxonomy and search functionality quicken decision-making processes.

data.title: Miller's Law
data.description: User information is chunked into digestible parts to enhance cognitive processing.
data.technical_spec: Simplified content layouts with adequate whitespace and logical grouping.

data.title: Jakob's Law
data.description: The platform's interface meets user expectations by mirroring other successful e-commerce interfaces.
data.technical_spec: Standard conventions like navigation bars, shopping carts, and search bars located where users expect them.

data.title: Tesler's Law
data.description: Complex processes are hidden from users, presenting a simple interface for the shopping experience.
data.technical_spec: Automation of repetitive tasks and smart suggestions reduce user effort.
